questions.question: How unusual is this March in Vilnius?
questions.answer: Based on retrieved DAG outputs, Vilnius March Temperature Anomalies Vilnius March through day 25 in 2026 has mean temperature 4.80 C, an anomaly of 4.26 C, and z-score 1.48.
questions.interpretation: A z-score of +1.48 is anomalous — outside typical variability.

questions.question: Can I trust the climate model outputs?
